# Desktop backend evidence excerpt (ANSI-stripped)
# Source: /api/dev/console-log aggregated Vite+API+Electrobun log

## Electrobun window launch + desktop main shell mode
Launcher starting on macos...
Server started at http://localhost:50000
[Env] desktopRuntimeMode=external externalApi=http://127.0.0.1:31501
[Renderer] Static server on http://127.0.0.1:5174
[Renderer:console] [shell] window shell mode: chat-overlay (search="?apiBase=http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A31501&shellMode=chat-overlay")
[Renderer:console] %c Info font-size: 12px; color: #0099ff; [startup-coordinator] phase=ready

## Model provider registration (OpenAI plugin adopts Cerebras endpoint)
[api       ]  Info       [OpenAI] Not registering IMAGE: the Cerebras endpoint does not serve it
[api       ]  Info       [OpenAI] Not registering IMAGE_DESCRIPTION: the Cerebras endpoint does not serve it
[api       ]  Info       [OpenAI] Not registering TRANSCRIPTION: the Cerebras endpoint does not serve it
[api       ]  Info       [OpenAI] Not registering TEXT_TO_SPEECH: the Cerebras endpoint does not serve it
[api       ]  Info       [local-inference] Registered eliza-local-inference llama.cpp text handlers at priority 0
[api       ]  Info       [ElizaOSCloud] Not registering chat-brain text handlers: ELIZAOS_CLOUD_USE_INFERENCE=false (another provider owns the text brain; image/media/TTS/embedding handlers stay active)

## BEFORE model fix (captured live during the first boot, ANSI-stripped):
# The runtime received the message but the OpenAI-plugin/Cerebras endpoint 404'd
# on the default model id, and the local llama.cpp fallback had no conversation
# GGUF staged, so no reply was generated. The verbatim router lines observed were:
#   [router] Provider openai failed for TEXT_SMALL; trying fallback provider (Not Found)
#   [router] Provider openai failed for TEXT_LARGE; trying fallback provider (Not Found)
# This surfaced in the UI as the assistant bubble "Something went wrong on my end.
# Please try again." (see desktop-chat-thread-transcript.json line 3). Those lines
# lived in the pre-restart session log; the aggregated console log below rotated on
# restart, so the section is intentionally not re-grepped here.

## AFTER model fix (OPENAI_BASE_URL=cerebras, model=gemma-4-31b): messages received, zero Not-Found
[api       ]  Warn       [CommunityInvestor] WARNING: message.content.channelId is missing for message b26fc443-532c-44c9-ac61-8067facb86cd ... Message content: {"text":"Desktop verification lane: reply with exactly one short sentence confirming you received this.","source":"client_chat","channelType":"DM","metadata":{"uiView":"chat","uiTab":"chat","uiViewPath":"/chat","uiViewCapabilities":["general-chat"],"__responseContext":{"primaryContext":"general","secondaryContexts":["general"]}}}
[api       ]  Warn       [CommunityInvestor] WARNING: message.content.channelId is missing for message 7f6d4f47-1f6d-454a-b097-853012793b62 ... Message content: {"text":"Reply with only this exact code and nothing else: ZQ7X-VERIFY-4821","source":"client_chat","channelType":"DM","metadata":{"uiView":"chat","uiTab":"chat","uiViewPath":"/chat","uiViewCapabilities":["general-chat"],"__responseContext":{"primaryContext":"general","secondaryContexts":["general"]}}}

Not-Found count in post-fix log: 0
